title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development workflows, including tools for web scraping, model switching, token usage monitoring, and code quality improvement. The video covers integration points like Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, and Anthropic skill modules to extend Claude's capabilities and reduce development time.
